issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE is deprecated (and is not granted) when targeting Android 13+. If you need to query or interact with MediaStore or media files on the shared storage, you should instead use one or more new storage permissions: `READ_MEDIA_IMAGES`, `READ_MEDIA_VIDEO` or `READ_MEDIA_AUDIO`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Field requires API level 28 (current min is 24): `android.content.Context#EUICC_SERVICE`
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 24): `android.location.LocationManager#getGnssAntennaInfos`
Class requires API level 28 (current min is 24): `android.telephony.euicc.EuiccManager`
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 24): `android.telephony.euicc.EuiccManager#isEnabled`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasLowPowerMode`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasGeofencing`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasSatelliteBlocklist`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasSatellitePvt`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasScheduling`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasSingleShotFix`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasOnDemandTime`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMsa`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMsb`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrections`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrectionsLosSats`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrectionsExcessPathLength`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrectionsReflectingPlane`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 33): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrectionsForDriving`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 33): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasMeasurementCorrelationVectors`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerTotal`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerSinglebandTracking`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerSinglebandAcquisition`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerMultibandTracking`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerMultibandAcquisition`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasPowerOtherModes`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 31): `android.location.GnssCapabilities#hasAccumulatedDeltaRange`
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission (usage from com.squareup.picasso.RemoteViewsAction.NotificationAction)
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function
Calling a @RememberInComposition annotated declaration inside composition without using `remember`
A newer version of Gradle than 9.4.1 is available: 9.5.1
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.compose than 2.3.21 is available: 2.4.0
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Using Configuration.screenWidthDp instead of LocalWindowInfo.current.containerSize
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be named modifier
issue.errorLine1: fun SatelliteItemView(satellite: Satellite, modfier: Modifier = Modifier) {

issue.message: Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Overriding `@dimen/abc_action_bar_stacked_tab_max_width` which is marked as private in androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.7.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.
StateFlow.value should not be called within composition
StateFlow.value should not be called within composition
Don't use a constant here; expected one of: `CellInfo.CONNECTION_NONE`, `CellInfo.CONNECTION_PRIMARY_SERVING`, `CellInfo.CONNECTION_SECONDARY_SERVING`, `CellInfo.CONNECTION_UNKNOWN`
Use `@RequiresApi(29) instead of `@TargetApi` to propagate the requirement to callers of `isMultiSimSupported`
Use `@RequiresApi(29) instead of `@TargetApi` to propagate the requirement to callers of `isRttSupported`
Use `@RequiresApi(26) instead of `@TargetApi` to propagate the requirement to callers of `isConcurrentVoiceAndDataSupported`

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
issue.errorLine1: } else if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.JELLY_BEAN_MR2 && cell is CellInfoWcdma) {

issue.message: Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 28
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 28
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24

Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

issue.message: The resource `R.string.storage_feature_disabled` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="storage_feature_disabled">This feature is disabled as it requires Storage Permission. You have previously rejected to grant this permission twice so if you wish to use this feature you will have to navigate to Device Settings and enable permission manually for Device Info app.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.phone_feature_disabled` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="phone_feature_disabled">This feature is disabled as it requires Read Phone State Permission. The image `draw.jpg` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/draw.jpg: 224x78 dp (336x117 px), mipmap-ldpi/draw.jpg: 271x113 dp (203x85 px), mipmap-mdpi/draw.jpg: 336x117 dp (336x117 px), mipmap-xhdpi/draw.jpg: 168x59 dp (336x117 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/draw.jpg: 112x39 dp (336x117 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/draw.jpg: 84x29 dp (336x117 px)

Consider whether this feature (`android.hardware.location.gps`) really is required for the app to function; you can set `android:required="false"` to indicate that the feature is used but not required
